data.title: Wall Street's Most Accurate Analysts Give Their Take On 3 Energy Stocks Delivering High-Dividend Yields
EXCLUSIVE: Worksport Targets $2M in Savings With Strategic Cuts, Set to Launch New Clean-Tech Products in 2025
data.description: Worksport Ltd (NASDAQ: WKSP) announced cost-saving measures to boost efficiency and growth, saving $1.5 million in 2025 and targeting significant revenue and cash flow growth by expanding tonneau cover business and launching clean tech products. Three new products expected on schedule. CEO Steven Rossi stated the measures will improve margins and financial standing without compromising innovation. Worksport also introduced 19 new models and is working on the Extreme Climate Heat Pump. Stock closed up 6.27%.

data.title: Former Home Of Red Hot Chili Peppers' Frontman Hits Market For $11.25M
Tesla Says Cybertruck Battery Can Be Used With Powerwall To Power Homes Starting 2025
data.description: Tesla will allow Cybertruck customers who also have the company's powerful home battery called Powerwall to power their homes with both in case of an outage starting in 2025.

data.title: Wall Street Poised To Open Higher As TSMC Earnings Expected To Kick Off Rally In Tech Stocks: Strategist Says AI Trade Will Have Legs Even In Case Of Recession In 2025
data.description: Technology stocks, specifically chipmakers, could lead from the front on Thursday as a stellar third-quarter earnings report from Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company Ltd.
